scripts.verify: npm run check:js && npm run test:webhook && npm run deploy:dry-run
scripts.db:migrate:local: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.wrangler/config wrangler d1 migrations apply watashi-kaigi-db --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.wrangler/config wrangler d1 migrations apply watashi-kaigi-db --remote
scripts.db:registrations: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.wrangler/config wrangler d1 execute watashi-kaigi-db --remote --command="SELECT order_id, participant_name, participant_email, participant_tel, event_date, ai_experience, payment_status, amount_total, currency, paid_at, organizer_email_sent_at, organizer_email_message_id, organizer_email_last_error FROM registrations ORDER BY created_at DESC"
